name: Imagen
description: Generate images from a text prompt using an OpenAI-compatible Images API.

providerId.description: Provider id in models.providers to read baseUrl/apiKey from. Ignored when baseUrl is set.

baseUrl.description: Override OpenAI-compatible base URL (with or without /v1). Example: https://api.openai.com/v1

apiKey.description: Override API key. If omitted, the plugin will still attempt the call (some backends may not require auth).

style.description: Optional style hint (supported by some models/providers).

sendMode.description: Prefer sending as a local file (best for Telegram when b64_json is available), or send a URL.

outputDir.description: Directory to store generated images. Defaults to <agents.defaults.workspace>/media/imagine when set, otherwise ~/.openclaw/media/imagine.
